title: Automatically update any item that hasn't been touched in 4 months
excerpt: As you may know, the “My Work” board will not show any item that has not been updated within the past four months. We plan a full year out, so this is…problematic. Is there a way to automatically trigger the “Last Update…

posts.author: klontok (Katherine Lontok)
posts.cookedHtml:
As you may know, the “My Work” board will not show any item that has not been updated within the past four months. We plan a full year out, so this is…problematic. Is there a way to automatically trigger the “Last Updated” on a schedule or something?

I’ve tried adding a formula column that populates if “Last Updated” is more than 4 months ago, but that doesn’t seem to trigger “Last Updated” itself to update - so frustrating!
